title: GenAI Is Not A Defense — Civil And Criminal
content: Utah removed "the AI did it" as a defense in both civil and criminal contexts. A principal who uses, prompts, or acts through generative AI remains liable for the resulting statement or act. The criminal rule (§76-2-107, SB 149, effective 2024-05-01) and the civil mirror (§13-75-102, SB 226, effective 2025-05-07) together eliminate the doctrine across Utah consumer-protection and criminal law.
